message:
fix(trace,test): TraceWriter drop flush + clippy lints in compat and test files

- trace/file.rs: flush compressed chunk and update event count in Drop
- tokio-compat: collapse match arms, fix doc lint
- doctor tests: suppress dead_code, use sort_unstable, map_or, format args

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
